name: Jordan Lee
summary: Data analyst with 4+ years of experience building KPI dashboards, automating reporting workflows, and translating business questions into actionable insights. Strong background in SQL, Python, and BI tools with a track record of improving decision speed and data quality.

bullets: Built and maintained Tableau dashboards for operations and finance, reducing weekly reporting time by 35%.
Developed SQL data models for shipment performance tracking across 12 regions.
Automated recurring KPI exports with Python scripts, saving 10+ analyst hours per week.
Partnered with leadership to define SLA metrics and identify root causes of delivery delays.
Analyzed customer behavior and retention trends using SQL and Excel, supporting campaign strategy changes.
Created monthly executive scorecards in Power BI to monitor revenue, churn, and product adoption.
Improved data validation checks for inbound CRM data, decreasing reporting errors by 22%.

education.school: University of North Carolina at Charlotte
details: Coursework: Applied Machine Learning, Data Mining, Database Systems, NLP
Capstone: Built churn prediction pipeline using XGBoost and feature engineering

bullets: Built binary classification model with 0.87 ROC-AUC on telecom churn dataset.
Designed feature pipeline and SHAP-based interpretability report for business users.
Combined SQL warehouse data with Tableau to visualize forecast vs. actuals by product line.
Enabled weekly planning meetings with drill-down views by region and account segment.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate

awards_and_achievements.title: Analytics Excellence Award
awards_and_achievements.description: Recognized for building an operations KPI framework adopted company-wide.
